protein_name: Guanine nucleotide exchange factor (GEF) for Rap1A, Rap2A and M-Ras GTPases. Does not interact with cAMP. Isoform 3 has highest expression levels in the brain, heart, liver, lung and placenta and is barely detectable in skeletal muscle, kidney and pancreas. 6 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: GTP-dependent protein binding; guanyl-nucleotide exchange factor activity; phosphatidic acid binding; protein binding; small GTPase binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: establishment of endothelial intestinal barrier; microvillus assembly; neuron projection development; positive regulation of microvillus assembly; protein localization to plasma membrane; Rap protein signal transduction; Ras protein signal transduction; regulation of GTPase activity; signal transduction; small GTPase-mediated signal transduction
